text: Reminder: the Aviation Heritage Museum docent orientation for new volunteers is scheduled for Saturday morning. Please review your aircraft identification reference sheet before attending.
Great news — our group photo walk at Saguaro National Park is confirmed for next weekend. Check the course calendar for the meeting time and carpool details.
This week's session on Medicare supplement plans has been moved to Thursday. Same time, same room. The Social Security worksheet is still due by end of month.
No formal session this Saturday — enjoy your round! The swing analysis reflection is still due March 20. Consider recording your practice session for self-review.
Bring two extra brushes to next week's session — we'll be working on wet-on-wet washes. Reference images for the desert landscape exercise are posted under Materials.
The native plant nursery tour is set for Saturday morning. Wear a hat and bring water. We'll meet at the greenhouse entrance at 8 AM before it gets hot.
Set up your practice wallet before our next session so we can walk through a test transaction together. Never share your recovery phrase with anyone, including me.
This week we cover the transition from piston engines to jets. The reading on early jet fighters is short — worth doing before class. Questions welcome as always.
Knife skills walkthrough moved up to the start of class. Bring an apron. The lower-sodium seasoning handout is posted; review it before we cook.
Practice the restaurant dialogue with a partner this week. We'll run through ordering and asking for the check at the next session. No need to be perfect — just speak.
The simulator exhibit will be down for maintenance Thursday morning. Plan your tour route accordingly. Identification quiz answers are posted under Materials.
Golden-hour shoot at Papago Park is confirmed for Saturday. Meet at the west lot at 6 AM. Bring a tripod if you have one.
The estate planning guest speaker is confirmed for next Tuesday. Submit your budget draft beforehand so we can use real numbers in the workshop.
Range session is on for Saturday morning, weather permitting. Focus on tempo, not power. The short-game drills handout is posted.
Nice work on the wash exercises. Next session we move to layering. Bring a photo of a scene you'd like to paint for the landscape project.
Frost watch this week — cover tender plants overnight if temperatures drop. We'll cover cold protection in detail on Thursday.
Reminder: enable two-factor authentication on your exchange account before next class. We'll review security settings together step by step.
Added a short documentary clip on the Berlin Airlift to Materials. It's a good companion to this week's reading on postwar military aviation.
Grocery store tour rescheduled to Thursday. We'll read nutrition labels together and find lower-sodium swaps for common pantry items.
Vocabulary list for travel and lodging is posted. Focus on the dining section — that's where most of you said you wanted the most practice.
